name: Sentry MS (AMTI)
_doc: Sensor-tasking MS payload (docs/03 World 3, level 3.2): the AESA radar boots straight to OPERATE and advertises one VOLUME AMTI capability. A valid AMTI_CommandMT schedules the activity (ACTIVE after 2 ticks) and reports two tracks; deterministic, no RNG (CLAUDE.md rule #3).
